message:
fix(freeze): fix copy_data_properties and fclosure bytecode registration

- Fix js_get_function_bytecode_ptr to handle JS_TAG_FUNCTION_BYTECODE from cpool
- Fix copy_data_properties to use JSValue exclusion list instead of ignored int flags
- Add registerCpoolBytecodeByName for cross-shard closure registration
- Fix rest destructuring exclusion (e.g., `const { x, ...rest } = obj`)

The copy_data_properties opcode now correctly excludes specified properties
when creating rest objects in destructuring patterns.
